tasks.dev: deno task verify:contracts && deno run --env --allow-env --allow-sys --allow-read --allow-net --allow-ffi --watch main.ts
tasks.check: deno task verify:contracts && deno check main.ts bootstrap.ts projectors.ts store.ts contracts/trellis_activity.ts
tasks.test:contracts: deno task verify:contracts && deno test -A source_emission_test.ts
